target_0.brief_supporting_logic: The building exhibits extensive structural collapse with missing roof sections, exposed internal framing, and collapsed walls across the entire visible length; debris field indicates complete loss of structural integrity consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed 75-100% structural loss. The scene depicts a long, single-story brick building with extensive damage: roof sections are missing, walls are collapsed, and debris is scattered across the foreground parking area. The functional impact is complete loss of occupancy and use, consistent with the prior assessment.
